description: xmuse V6 sidecar replay packet contract — example fixture

items.content: We need to implement feature X for the platform
Let me analyze the requirements and create a plan
Mission blueprint: implement feature X across 3 lanes

design_rationale.packet_id_stable: Deterministic from conversation_id + intent hash, reproducible
design_rationale.scope_note: Optional hint linking to ChatMemoryScope for downstream routing
design_rationale.items_sorted: Items are always sorted chronologically for deterministic replay
design_rationale.source_type_vs_envelope: source_type is the canonical PacketSourceType; envelope_type preserves original xmuse envelope classification
